reasoning: Stub critic (autonomous run, 2026-05-25): apps/dashboard wizard-shell + Cloudflare Access auth + tenant provisioning. The package surface matches the brief — middleware + provisioning fan-out + wizard layout + step router + sign-in + tenant/me + wizard state hook + state API route + migrations + event registry update. UI primitives are sourced exclusively from @caia/ui (PR #597); FSM lookups use @caia/state-machine (with the IA states from PR #594); the tenant.provisioned bus event uses @chiefaia/event-bus-nats (PR #590). Reuse-first compliance is documented in PLAN.md §3 + §4 with the full reuseSearchResults table — every @caia/* / @chiefaia/* package considered, with explicit selected/rejected rationale. Native `fetch` is used for the Infisical V2 workspace-create call (allowed by reuse-check-strict + Semgrep — they only block raw axios/node-fetch/better-sqlite3); raw `pg` driver is used for Postgres (no rule against `pg`). The middleware uses the `nodejs` runtime in V1 because `pg` + `nats` are needed in the same trip; Wave 2 will split the provisioning path into a Node-runtime route handler so the edge can stay lean (documented in PLAN.md §2.2). Per-step UI for onboarding/grand-idea/interview/architecture/proposal/design/atlas is intentionally deferred — they land on sibling PRs. Operator should run a live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
requested_modifications: Operator: run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
Wave 2: split provisioning into a Node-runtime route handler so the middleware can move to the edge runtime.
Wave 2: add cross-tenant audit log on /api/wizard/[projectId]/state (project-belongs-to-tenant check).
Wave 2: extend @caia/secrets-infisical to wrap the workspace-creation admin API.
Wave 2: adopt @chiefaia/http-client for the Infisical call once that package ships on develop.
Wave 2: adopt @chiefaia/persistence-postgres for the pg.Pool once that package ships on develop.
Wave 2: extract a @caia/ui Stack / Page layout primitive to absorb the inline-style wrappers in WizardLayout / SignInPage.
